title: Long-save stability and migration gate
summary: Validate long-save stability, migration policy and save/replay evidence for 1.0 without making owner-gated public save commitments.
acceptance: Defines and validates M8 long-save/migration gate
Adds focused save/replay or migration evidence for M8 scenarios
Keeps public save compatibility and Windows/Web interoperability owner-gated unless separately approved
Protects existing save/replay and command replay evidence
Does not add broad Electron filesystem APIs

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Defined focused M8 long-save/migration gate; added M8 save/replay tests and diagnostics; kept public compatibility and Windows/Web interoperability owner-gated; required checks pass

changes_requested: High: M8 load/resume accepts out-of-gate ticks: load rebuilds from parsed createdTick yet returns M8_LOAD_TICK, and resume can finish at save tick before load tick, violating the focused 72000/72001 gate. Medium: parseM8AdvanceCommandId accepts trailing junk via parseInt, collapsing malformed command ids. Required review checks passed.
Repaired reviewer findings: focused M8 gate now rejects non-72000 save ticks and invalid resume finals; command-id parsing now requires full-string safe integers; required checks pass

verified: No blocking findings. Re-review probes confirm non-72000 saves fail closed, load requires 72000/72001, resume rejects finals before load and non-100000 finals, and command-id parsing rejects trailing junk. Required review checks pass.

Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: typecheck, persistence, m5-save-replay, m8-save-replay, sim:replay-test default and M8 scenario, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.

forbiddenPaths: broad Electron filesystem or shell APIs

review.summary: No blocking findings. Re-review probes confirm non-72000 saves fail closed, load requires 72000/72001, resume rejects finals before load and non-100000 finals, and command-id parsing rejects trailing junk. Required review checks pass.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: typecheck, persistence, m5-save-replay, m8-save-replay, sim:replay-test default and M8 scenario, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
